title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd!
